prompt: Create a glossy Japanese pro-wrestling magazine cover illustration in a dramatic seinen-anime style. Vertical full-cover composition, packed and high-energy, showing exactly 8 handsome male wrestlers inside a wrestling ring arena under blue-white stadium lights, with blurred audience bokeh in the background and visible red ring ropes crossing behind them. All 8 men are adults with extremely muscular, bodybuilder-level physiques, oiled shiny skin, defined abs, pecs, arms, and shoulders, posed like a special feature lineup for a sports magazine. Arrange them in layered groups: 4 wrestlers across the upper half and 4 across the lower half, with 2 central foreground champions dominating the middle. The central left foreground wrestler has short black hair, a confident serious expression, a clenched right fist, and metallic black-and-gold trunks. The central right foreground wrestler has short spiky blond hair, a stoic expression, one hand on his hip, and metallic bright blue trunks. Around them, place 6 additional wrestlers with varied hair colors and styles including bleached blond, black with long bangs, orange spiky hair, and dark brown spiky hair; all wear colorful pro-wrestling trunks in red, blue, gold, or multicolor patterns, with some wrist tape or wristbands, and all are shirtless. Emphasize glossy highlights, magazine-retouched skin, heroic anatomy, and slightly exaggerated masculine beauty. Use a bold commercial cover design with oversized Japanese masthead text at the top reading 熱闘プロレス in huge red letters with gold edging and white highlights, plus a smaller English subtitle beneath it reading "NETTOU PRO-WRESTLING". Add a top catchphrase in Japanese above the title: "プロレスが一番熱い！". In the upper right corner, include a blue issue box with white text showing 2026年5月号, a large numeral 5, the English month-year "MAY 2026", and small pricing text "定価1,200円". Place bold feature cover lines around the wrestlers in authentic Japanese magazine typography: on the left, large yellow-white text "最強世代 8人集結" with smaller lines "新たな歴史が いま、始まる！"; on the right, large white text "美しき筋肉と闘志" with smaller yellow and white subhead lines; another red label with white text reading "若きエースたちの現在地" and smaller white text beneath it; a lower-left black box headed "SPECIAL INTERVIEW" in English with multiple stacked Japanese interviewee names; a cream circular burst on the lower right reading "両面BIG ピンナップ付き！". Across the lower center, add the main feature title in explosive oversized Japanese lettering: a red ribbon label "保存版" above giant gold and red text イケメンレスラー大特集, with a smaller white tagline below: "その強さ、その美しさ、そのすべてに恋をする！". Add a barcode in the bottom right corner with small numeric text beneath it. Overall look: premium Japanese sports-entertainment magazine cover, polished, flashy, energetic, intense, glamorous, crowded but readable, with accurate Japanese text rendering and authentic editorial hierarchy.
